expectations.text: Produces a full email with a subject line, body, and a single clear CTA
expectations.evidence: Subject, body, and a single 'Connect your account' CTA.
Preview line present: 'Connecting your bank takes ~60 seconds...'.

expectations.text: Body directly addresses the specific friction (never connected a bank account)
expectations.evidence: Body is entirely about connecting the bank account and what it unlocks, plus a security reassurance.

expectations.text: Has exactly one primary call to action, not several competing ones
expectations.evidence: Single primary CTA; the 'reply for manual option' is a low-friction fallback, not a competing CTA.

expectations.text: Does not fabricate user statistics or testimonials; any such proof is a marked placeholder
expectations.evidence: No invented stats; closing note marks time/number claims as placeholders.
